headline: Angelic Intelligence: Why Virtue-Native AI Makes Guardrails Obsolete
summary: As artificial intelligence reshapes global industry, a Davos-recognized entrepreneur is advancing a provocative thesis: that ethics cannot be added to AI after the fact — it must be built in from the first line of code. headline: Paul Roeder Named Chief Communications Officer of The Walt Disney Company
summary: BURBANK, Calif., March 12, 2026--Paul Roeder has been named Senior Executive Vice President and Chief Communications Officer of The Walt Disney Company (NYSE: DIS), effective March 19, it was announced today by incoming Chief Executive Officer Josh D’Amaro. A 25-year veteran of Disney, Roeder most recently served as Executive Vice President, Communications – Disney Entertainment Studios, Direct-to-Consumer, and International.
